message.content:
look at the following branches and determine if they are complete and fully merged.  if not, figure out what to do

  str-28vd.2
  str-28vd.6
  str-28vd.8-bugfix-workflow-skill
  str-3ky9.11
  str-3ky9.16
  str-9i6d
  str-fpgb.13
  str-fpgb.5
[

input.command: for b in str-28vd.2 str-28vd.6 str-28vd.8-bugfix-workflow-skill str-3ky9.11 str-3ky9.16 str-9i6d str-fpgb.13 str-fpgb.5; do echo "=== $b ==="; git log main..$b --oneline 2>/dev/null || echo "  (branch not found or no commits ahead)"; echo "---"; git log $b..main --oneline 2>/dev/null | head -5; echo ""; done
input.description: Check merge status of all branches

input.command: for b in str-28vd.2 str-28vd.6 str-28vd.8-bugfix-workflow-skill str-3ky9.11 str-3ky9.16 str-9i6d str-fpgb.13 str-fpgb.5; do merged=$(git branch --merged main | grep -w "$b" && echo "YES" || echo "NO"); echo "$b: merged=$merged"; done
input.description: Check which branches are merged into main

content.text: Now let me check if the content from those unmerged commits already exists on main (merged via a different commit).

input.command:
# Check if the files from str-3ky9.16 already exist on main
git show main:docs/hooks.md 2>/dev/null | head -5 && echo "EXISTS" || echo "NOT ON MAIN"
echo "---"
git show main:scripts/setup-hooks.sh 2>/dev/null | head -5 && echo "EXISTS" || echo "NOT ON MAIN"
echo "---"
# Check files from str-fpgb.5
git show main:.semgrep/shatter.yml 2>/dev/null | head -5 && echo "EXISTS" || echo "NOT ON MAIN"
echo "---"
git show main:.claude/skills/bugfix/SKILL.md 2>/dev/null | head -5 && echo "EXISTS" || echo "NOT ON MAIN"
input.description: Check if unmerged branch content already on main
